title: Vaadipulla Vaadi Lyrics Hiphop Tamizha
stanzas:
ooru oram
aalan thoppu
adhula vazhum
kiiligalin kadhai thaane.

un kadhal en katchu
un pechu en moochu
adi unnai pattri
nitham padi aachu

unkobam adhu vetpam
un ullam parisuththam
adi nee pirindha
nodiyinil endhan
uyir paspam

oru vaarthai sollava
unnidathil naan
endrendrum thurathi
varuven unnaithaan.

ennai thaedi neeyum
odi vaadi vaadi
vaadi vaadi

kaathirundha kadhalukku
solladi nalvazhi
un kadhal ennai
sedhukkidum orr uli

ah penne ennai paar
oru mutham ondru thaa
unai mattum ninaithadhu
indha idhayam allava
azha vaa

siru kanneer thuli
endhan kannin oram.
kadhalithu
tholviutrathaal
nenjukul baaram

kanneeril vazhvathaal
naamum ingae meengalthaan
neendhithaan kadhal
endra karayai poi
seralaam

serum mun madham
endra valayil
naam vilundhaal
uyir pirindhaal
kadhal murindhaal

ingillai endraal
sorgathil naam seralaam
sorgathil nammai
saadhi madham endru
pirithaal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vaadipulla Vaadi'?

The song conveys a lively and playful vibe, celebrating love and youthful exuberance.

Is there a movie associated with this song?

The song is part of an album and does not belong to a specific movie.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

Hip Hop Tamizha is both the singer and music director for Vaadipulla Vaadi.

When was 'Vaadipulla Vaadi' released?

The song was released on November 21, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaadipulla Vaadi, Hip Hop Tamizha delivers an energetic anthem that resonates with the spirit of youth and celebration. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and excitement, making it ideal for parties and gatherings. It captures the essence of carefree love and the thrill of youthful adventures. Overall, this track is a perfect blend of fun and rhythm, evoking a sense of happiness and celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaadipulla Vaadi is an electrifying track that showcases the vibrant energy of Hip Hop Tamizha. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this song is perfect for any celebration. Dive into the world of rhythm and fun that this track brings to life!
stanzaMeanings: Why does my heart speak like this about love?
In this town, there are stories of the butterflies that live in the garden.
Your love is my treasure, your words are my breath; I keep singing about you every day.
Your anger is like poison, your heart is pure; when you leave, my life becomes sorrow.
Can I say just one word? I will always come back to you; it's only you I think about.
You left me, and where are you going, girl?
You search for me, running away, come back, come back, come back.
I only think of you, that's what my heart holds.
Come, moon, you are my moonlight.
For the love that waited, tell me the right way; your love will take me away.
Without you, there is no light in my life.
This pain of love cannot be endured.
Oh girl, look at me; this heart only thinks of you, come and see.
Tears fall from my eyes; love has made my heart heavy.
In tears, we live here; let’s not let love's pain go away.
If we fall into the cycle of love, we will lose our lives.
Keep only the memories of us in your mind.
If we are here, we can be in heaven; if we are in heaven, we can achieve our desires.
Heaven is not needed; we can live in hell.
I only think of you, that's what my heart holds.
Come, moon, you are my moonlight.
I only think of you, that's what my heart holds. Come...
